forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KY7EW9GVWFSP0WA5VXVW26RQ
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8380'
+title: 'M3: execution substrate — consume Router''s grown sessions'
+---
+Plan §14 M3 inverted by the collapse: formerly 'the Router growth' to be driven from here; now CONSUME what Router's board already tracks — jkdae4b (tools through makeSession), 8213x39 (auto-compaction opt-in: per-agent budget + fold prompt), 46adpch (rich event stream), 6j4bven (creation metadata: parent session id + parent tool-call id). Remaining live asks to negotiate on Router's board from here: spawn (child session, fresh cache, lineage beside fork) and the lineage index. AgentRun = one Router session per run, per-agent tools/instructions/budget; instructions assembled via Extras AgentsMd (cross-repo: Extras 67w7zj6) + the agent definition's system prompt.
\ No newline at end of file
